headline: Palantir Chair Peter Thiel's Pro-Doping Enhanced Games Aims To Raise $300M: Report
summary: Peter Thiel-backed Enhanced Games is pursuing $300 million in funding amidst controversy surrounding its doping policies.

headline: Facebook Parent Company Meta Sued By Former Arkansas Gov Huckabee Over Weed Product Ad Misuse
summary:
Legal Action Against Meta

Former Arkansas Governor Mike Huckabee (R)has initiated a lawsuit against Meta Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ: META), the parent company of Facebook, in the U.S. District Court in Delaware.

headline: Tesla Stock At 6-Month High, Orders Trickle In For Canoo, Nio CFO Departs And More: Biggest EV Stories Of The Week
summary: The EV makers are not out of the woods yet, but green shoots of recovery are evident among major players following an industry shakeout.

headline: Nintendo's President Says AI Can Be 'Creative,' But Raises Intellectual Property Concerns
summary: Nintendo President Shuntaro Furukawa discusses AI in game development, emphasizing creative potential and intellectual property concerns.

summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors’ favorite stocks over the last week — here’s a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Gary Black Raises Tesla Price Target As Ex-Ford CEO Notes Irony of Auto-Driven Stock Rally Amid Elon Musk's AI And Robotics Focus
summary: Tesla bull Gary Black raised his price target to $270 and increased his 2024 EPS estimate to $2.4, with optimism for 2030.

headline: Apple Approves Epic Games' Marketplace App In Europe Amid Ongoing Feud
summary: Apple has approved Epic Games' marketplace app for iPhones and iPads in Europe amid ongoing disputes, marking a significant development in their ongoing conflict.

headline: Nvidia Gets Rare Downgrade Over Concerns That Demand Is Normalizing 'In Line With Expectations:' Stock 'Getting Fully Valued'
summary: Nvidia has received a rare downgrade from New Street Research, with the analyst citing concerns about the stock's overvaluation.

headline: Tesla CEO Elon Musk Considers Building Replica Of TARS From Interstellar In Addition To Optimus: 'Would Be So Cute'
summary: Elon Musk teases building a robot resembling TARS from Interstellar, in addition to its humanoid robot Optimus, as Tesla aims to become a robotics and sustainable energy company.

headline: PayPal's 'Unfair Contract Term' With Small Businesses That Led To Overcharging Ruled Out By Australian Court (Updated)
summary: This particular term required customers who failed to report overcharging errors within a 60-day period to accept the charges as accurate.
